feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: 'Someone who loves you wouldn't do this'
entry.summary:
Author: Justhereforthepoet

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,320Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 183

Summary: Everyone on the team knew that calls involving children were hard, especially for Buck.But this was different. for buck it was like he was back there. He felt the endless hunger bubbling in his stomach, the phantom feeling of cracked lips. He felt like he needed a shower, now. He needed to wash off the never-ending dirt from his skin.

entry.title: You've Got Mail (but make it Buddie)
entry.summary:
Author: FishMagee

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,271Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 93

Summary: After Buck pesters Eddie about dating, Eddie starts to wonder if he should get back out there. Filled with anxiety at the prospect, Eddie tries Alex's suggestion of online dating. Feeling that perhaps words on a screen will be less anxiety-inducing, Eddie give the app Soulmate a shot. The app randomly pairs two people and only lets them know each other's first initial.Eddie's match, "E" and him hit it off. Little does he know that "E" stands for Evan. Or: I love You've Got Mail, so I write a story where I shove these characters into a similar situation.

entry.title: Aftershock
entry.summary:
Author: justherefortheplot

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,413Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: When Evan Buckley is struck by lightning during a rescue, the 118 prepare for the worst. Damon Salvatore refuses to let his friend die. Now Buck is waking up with heightened senses, impossible hunger, and the horrifying realization that death was only the beginning. As witches hide secrets, hunters sharpen stakes, and Los Angeles somehow becomes tangled in the Mystic Falls' supernatural world of chaos, Buck finds himself caught between the life he had and the monster he is becoming. And Damon may have just destroyed them both trying to save him.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: 100 miles from my home
entry.summary:
Author: Lyla_Nostra

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,422Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 114

Summary: Buck saved fifteen people before the pacific claimed him. Four days later, he was declared dead. A week later, they buried an empty casket. But Evan Buckley has always been a fighter, and he isn’t done yet. While Eddie struggles to raise Christopher without their anchor, Buck begins a grueling journey back from the dead. Because there is nothing in this world that could stop Buck from coming back to his family.

entry.summary:

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,233Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 50

entry.title: Finding Those Lost
entry.summary:
Author: Not_Ren_42

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 66,373Chapters: 17/24Kudos: 518

Summary: Evangaline ‘Buck’ Buckley has made a home for herself in LA. After the long and difficult path to get here, she doesn’t think there is much left to surprise her. She has a new family, her son is thriving, and she’s loving her work as a firefighter. So what if sometimes the dark still comes for her some nights?When a new firefighter starts at the station, everything Buck thought she knew is thrown up in the air as she tries to keep her past and private life together. Things only get worse when dispatch starts messing the whole station around. -+- A season 2 rewrite that won't make much sense unless you've read part 1. New chapter every Friday :)

entry.title: Weight Of The World
entry.summary:
Author: Ruddy_Hell_Its_Danny

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 73,924Chapters: 4/18Kudos: 26

Summary: 9-1-1 Season 3 rewrite where Buck and Maddie are Bobby’s biological kids. Synopsis: The members of Station 118 face their toughest challenges. Buck Nash fights desperately to return to work, jeopardizing his physical and mental well-being, while Eddie copes with the chaos of his last year in a self-destructive manner, and Maddie grapples with the aftermath of her abusive past, while relationships are tested.

entry.title: These Bad Omens (I Look Right Through Them)
entry.summary:
Author: trinbuckleydiaz

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,000Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 3

Summary: Buck has always ignored the warning signs in his life. It's easier that way. But after one too many close calls, sleepless nights, and moments with Eddie that feel a little too important to just be friendship, ignoring it starts becoming impossible. Because Eddie Diaz has somehow become the center of Buck's universe, and loving him feels a lot like staring down every bad omen imaginable and choosing to look right through them anyway. or: Buck is in love with his best friend, and that's definitely not going to become a problem.

entry.title: Nothing is Safe in the Quiet
entry.summary:
Author: toastylamp

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 42,329Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 214

Summary: “Tommy, fucking answer me!” He was yelling now, swiping his free hand nervously over his hair. He feels the urge to hit something. Someone. He wants to punch and punch and punch until his knuckles bleed out because it means he can still feel something. “Evan is going to need you, you know,” Tommy says quietly. Eddie can hear sobs in the background. Now what the fuck is that supposed to mean? “What happened to Bobby?” Eddie’s voice breaks. “Where is he?” Tommy exhales like it hurts. “Bobby Nash is dead.” It hits Eddie like a bag of bricks to his stomach. His knees weaken, his ears ring, and for a second, everything goes white. When he returns to reality, Tommy’s voice calls his name on the phone. He swipes at his face, breath shaky. “Tell Buck I’m on the next flight out.” He hangs up.   Or: Eddie Diaz is trying to have a quiet movie night with his son when the phone rings. It’s Tommy Kinard—and he’s saying Bobby Nash is dead. Everything spirals after that. 6/22/26 - I'm back!

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: I'll bring you home
entry.summary:
Author: CarpeDiem911

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,171Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 56

Summary: After a tragic accident leaves Connor and Kameron’s son orphaned, Buck struggles with what role he’s supposed to play in Theo’s life — and whether someone like him could ever be enough for a child. Before he and Eddie can figure any of that out, the 118 is called to an active hostage situation at a Los Angeles junior high school. What starts as another terrifying call quickly turns into every firefighter’s nightmare.

entry.title: de-dicked
entry.summary:
Author: forevervalentine

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,945Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 8

Summary: Eddie never quite got the hang of using an STP. He'd tried it at home and in the shower, but never got the courage to use it out in public, and who are you meant to ask especially when stealth? Your best friend, who will gladly hold your dick while you pee, apparently. ---or--- “Why won’t you just go?” Buck asked, stepping back into Eddie’s personal space like he belonged there. “The urinal’s right there.” “It’s not that simple,” Eddie groaned. “Sure it is.” He stepped closer, reaching down, “You just point your dick—“ And it came off in his hands. Eddie’s dick left his hands and was now cradled in Buck’s. Laid flat in Buck’s palm was a silky silicone model of a dick, attached to a less malleable reservoir device. The proper term was ‘stand-to-pee’ and Buck was pretty familiar. Tucked into his own slacks, inside his boxers and nuzzled up against his thigh, was a hollow packer. In his back pocket the reservoir attachment stayed hidden until he needed it. He sent a toothy grin Eddie’s way. “You too?”

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Fifty Eight Candles
entry.summary:
Author: chucks_prophet

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,037Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 8

Summary: Buck politely declined while swallowing the golf ball-sized lump in his throat. He doesn’t want to be captain. He wants his captain. The captain who insisted the 118 isn’t family the same day he sent everyone home with a tub of his famous chili. The same captain who practically dragged him out of Tiki-Ti himself when Buck got a little too tipsy on strawberry daiquiris despite being in recovery. The same captain who was there for his first love and what is his last with open arms because Buck’s heart can’t take another break.The same captain that, despite his best efforts, he couldn’t save from himself.

  • Major Character Death
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)

entry.title: some things stay
entry.summary:
Author: literalmetaphor

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 67,569Chapters: 18/18Kudos: 166

Summary: “You gotta be pretty desperate to take a job like this, especially with a kid.” “Why’s that?” Eddie’s face flickers through a dozen almost-expression, like hail against a window pane, never quite breaking through. Buck ticks the reason off on his fingers. “You got a ghost story looming over everything. No civilization for miles. The place is old and dark and, well, let’s be honest—creepy. The proprietor is an obvious drunk. That enough for you?” Eddie scoffs. “You forgot to mention the incredibly off-putting gardener.” Buck definitely does not smile. “That too.” Then, “So, I figure there’s something equally wrong with you.” -- A loose Bly Manor AU.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: We're gonna keep on living (the stunt life we choose)
entry.summary:
Author: DuoOfDiaz (TPCOTMW)

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,418Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 16

Summary: Buck is working his dream job as a stuntman. It's fun and fulfilling and he gets to work with his favorite people every day. However, sometimes the unthinkable happens. What will Buck do if that turns out to be today?

entry.title: Jigsaw Falling into Place
entry.summary:
Author: bubbleaurum

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 42,162Chapters: 7/12Kudos: 179

Summary: “Buck, I don’t want to upset you,” he said. “But can you feel this?” Eddie’s eyes gestured down at his arm. Buck followed along the bandages, expecting to see some sort of spot of red or maybe an odd-angled turn. Instead his heart rose and fell too fast as he realized that since they’d been talking, Eddie hadn’t just had his hand on his shoulder. His other was delicately wrapped in Buck’s exposed fingers, starkly white even against the bedding. Buck tried to move them, wanting so badly, even with all this and even as much as it could give him away, to curl back.They didn’t move.……After a spiral, Buck attempts the unthinkable. Eddie helps him recover, but his lasting injuries present new challenges that jeopardize his career. Now he has to get his mental health in order, face potentially leaving the firehouse, and all while being completely and totally in love with his best friend.

entry.title: Your Heart’s a Bird Without the Wings to Fly
entry.summary:
Author: catniss_37

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 37,400Chapters: 14/20Kudos: 132

Summary: "Buck!" Eddies voice rang through the space, abruptly cut off by the deafening sound of crumpling concrete hitting the ground. Eddie stared at the rubble now blocking the way between himself and Buck. "Buck," Eddie whimpered as he dropped to his knees in front of the pile of rubble Buck was buried under. OR If episode 9x3 actually included the subway collapse from the promo, because I'm so mad about that.Continuing the story using that as a plot point. It will be canon divergent from that point onward in season 9, episode 3.
